title: Custom ps format prints escaped values
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->
`podman ps --format` prints characters `>` instead of `>`

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Run `podman ps --format 'table {{.Names}} {{.Ports}}'`

**Describe the results you received:**

```
Names                  Ports
xxxxxxxxx_redis_1      127.0.0.1:5432->5432/tcp
xxxxxxxxx_postgres_1   127.0.0.1:5432->5432/tcp
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

```
Names                  Ports
xxxxxxxxx_redis_1      127.0.0.1:5432->5432/tcp
xxxxxxxxx_postgres_1   127.0.0.1:5432->5432/tcp
```

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:            1.9.2
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.14.2
Git Commit:         de2379a75863bdaf3ce8d414045d0b52c544f49a
Built:              Wed May 13 23:16:53 2020
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```
debug:
  compiler: gc
  gitCommit: de2379a75863bdaf3ce8d414045d0b52c544f49a
  goVersion: go1.14.2
  podmanVersion: 1.9.2
host:
  arch: amd64
  buildahVersion: 1.14.8
  cgroupVersion: v1
  conmon:
    package: Unknown
    path: /usr/bin/conmon
    version: 'conmon version 2.0.16, commit: a97780984207f29652af90fa3dc4e8e7576548e7'
  cpus: 4
  distribution:
    distribution: arch
    version: unknown
  eventLogger: file
  hostname: battlestation
  idMappings:
    gidmap: null
    uidmap: null
  kernel: 5.6.11-arch1-1
  memFree: 9957736448
  memTotal: 12448952320
  ociRuntime:
    name: runc
    package: Unknown
    path: /usr/bin/runc
    version: |-
      runc version 1.0.0-rc10
      commit: dc9208a3303feef5b3839f4323d9beb36df0a9dd
      spec: 1.0.1-dev
  os: linux
  rootless: false
  slirp4netns:
    executable: ""
    package: ""
    version: ""
  swapFree: 0
  swapTotal: 0
  uptime: 35m 10.69s
registries:
  search:
  - docker.io
  - registry.fedoraproject.org
  - quay.io
  - registry.access.redhat.com
  - registry.centos.org
store:
  configFile: /etc/containers/storage.conf
  containerStore:
    number: 3
    paused: 0
    running: 3
    stopped: 0
  graphDriverName: overlay
  graphOptions:
    overlay.mountopt: nodev
  graphRoot: /var/lib/containers/storage
  graphStatus:
    Backing Filesystem: extfs
    Native Overlay Diff: "false"
    Supports d_type: "true"
    Using metacopy: "true"
  imageStore:
    number: 5
  runRoot: /var/run/containers/storage
  volumePath: /var/lib/containers/storage/volumes
```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
~ (master) × sudo pacman -Qi podman
Name            : podman
Version         : 1.9.2-1
Description     : Tool and library for running OCI-based containers in pods
Architecture    : x86_64
URL             : https://github.com/containers/libpod
Licenses        : Apache
Groups          : None
Provides        : None
Depends On      : cni-plugins  conmon  device-mapper  iptables  libseccomp  runc  slirp4netns  libsystemd  fuse-overlayfs  skopeo
Optional Deps   : podman-docker: for Docker-compatible CLI
Required By     : podman-compose-git
Optional For    : None
Conflicts With  : None
Replaces        : None
Installed Size  : 101.81 MiB
Packager        : Morten Linderud <foxboron@archlinux.org>
Build Date      : Wed 13 May 2020 11:16:53 PM CEST
Install Date    : Thu 14 May 2020 01:39:54 AM CEST
Install Reason  : Explicitly installed
Install Script  : No
Validated By    : Signature
```

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**
Arch Linux on physical machine

comments.body: Working fine with the new v2.0 code on my system. Going to close as such; this is minor enough that I don't think we want a backport to v1.9
